description: Top-level container for resources that specifies the type and version of the resource it's specifying and carries identity, ownership, and status information.

context.description: Defines a bounded context that this resource belongs to. Context is usually composed of a domain and a version e.g. `datasets.opendatafabric.org/v1`.

kind.description: Type name of the resource which is unique within a given context.

headers.description: Container for identity and ownership information of a resource.

spec.description: Specifies the desired state of a resource.
